groups.natural_language_proof_pattern: Run pre_process, split pure/spatial obligations, cancel the four store resources, unfold STSUseFlagPost, select the data_src=1/update=TRUE32 branch, unfold STSUseFlagMappedStatus, and select the matching mapped-status disjunct.
proving_hints: use current PreH equality/disequality facts for the selected disjunct
avoid forbidden structural equivalence lemmas; no helper needed

groups.natural_language_proof_pattern: Cancel the post stores after instantiating post-state values. Unfold STSUseFlagPost and select one of the old_data_src=1/update<>TRUE32 branches.
proving_hints: use PreH1 for the status branch and PreH2 for update<>TRUE32
all remaining field equalities are reflexive

groups.natural_language_proof_pattern: Cancel the post stores after instantiating update to 0. Unfold STSUseFlagPost and select the old_data_src<>1 branch. Unfold STSUseFlag_FALSE32 to close update equality.
